content: In 1971, the RDC was renamed Zaire.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Amastan (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ber:Deg wagim tẓat n tmaḍ samraw yiwen, Tagduda Tamegdayt n Kungu sneflen-as isem, rran-tt d Zayir
ber:Deg wagim tẓat n tmaḍ samraw yiwen, Tagduda Tamegdayt n Kungu beddlen-as isem, rran-tt d Zayir
